title: Roadmap Decision
prompt: Roadmap decision: should we prioritize safe command execution next, or keep improving conversation quality and strategic memory first?

memory_context.content: Voice and Jarvis-style features are deferred until the core decision-quality system is mature.
memory_context.summary: Voice remains deferred behind core maturity.

strategic_memory_context.content: Command execution should be approval-gated and deferred until conversation, memory, traces, and validation are stable.
strategic_memory_context.summary: Execution comes after stable decision-quality core.
